sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 19:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section I, List of Answers on Topics 19:1
items.html: Kabbalah speaks only of the expansion of the light from His self, though in His self, we have no word or uttering. (Inner Light, Part 1, Chap 1, item 2)
